info.aboutMetaDescription: Custom 3D printed toys, models, figures and keychains in Vietnam.
info.aboutStoryP1: {siteName} started from a passion for models and DIY toys. From a single 3D printer in a workspace, we gradually built a small workshop specializing in figures, assembly models, keychains, and personalized gifts for the Vietnamese hobby community.
info.aboutStoryP2: We believe a good product is not only beautiful but also durable and safe. That is why every order is manually checked before it reaches you.
info.aboutValueCustomBody: Every product is 3D printed on demand using FDM technology, allowing customization of size, color, and details.
info.aboutValueMaterialBody: We use biodegradable PLA plastic and sturdy PETG, thoroughly finishing surfaces and rounding sharp edges before delivery.
info.aboutValueWarrantyBody: If a product has issues, we will support returns or reprints.
info.aboutValueDeliveryBody: Carefully packaged and shipped via carrier partners nationwide, with convenient VietQR payment.
info.contactMetaDescription: Contact {storeName} about orders, products, or collaboration. We respond within one business day.
info.contactDescription: Contact {storeName} about orders, products, or collaboration.
info.contactFormSuccessBody: Your message has been sent. We usually respond within one business day.
info.faqMetaDescription: Answers to common questions about ordering, payment, shipping, returns, and 3D printed products.
info.faqQ1: How do I place an order?
info.faqA1: Browse the catalog, open a product page, select options and add to cart. At checkout, enter shipping info and pay via VietQR. You will receive confirmation once payment is verified.
info.faqQ2: What payment methods do you accept?
info.faqA2: We accept VietQR payments through payOS. After ordering, scan the QR code with your banking app, confirm the amount, and complete the transfer. Orders are processed once payment is confirmed.
info.faqQ3: Can I order without an account?
info.faqA3: Yes. You can check out as a guest with your email and shipping info — no account required. Creating an account helps you track orders and save favorites more easily.
info.faqQ4: Are 3D printed toys safe for children?
info.faqA4: Our products are mainly printed with PLA — a BPA-free bioplastic — and food-safe PETG for details needing durability. Each product is cleaned, sharp edges rounded, and inspected before delivery. 3D printed toys are suitable for children aged 3+.
info.faqA5: Yes. Send us photos, 3D files (STL/OBJ), or a description of your idea. Our team will model it, quote the price, print and finish it, then ship nationwide.
info.faqA6: Since products are made to order, returns are handled case by case. Please contact us within 7 days of receiving your order if the product is damaged or not as described, with photos and your order code.
info.faqQ7: How do I track my order?
info.faqA7: After ordering, use the reference code in your confirmation email to check status. We notify you when printing starts, when handed to the carrier, and when it is on its way to you.
